01 // About

Who Am I?

Hey! I'm Shantanu Kadam, a first-year B.Tech student in Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering at Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering (PCCOE), Pune. I'm passionate about the convergence of software and hardware — writing code that makes real things happen in the physical world.

I discovered my love for programming through Python, and since then I've been building projects that blend software logic with electronic hardware. I genuinely enjoy the challenge of debugging a circuit or optimizing an algorithm — both give me that same satisfying "aha!" moment.

Beyond the technical side, I believe in clarity over complexity — clean code, straightforward solutions, and effective communication. I'm driven by curiosity and love exploring new domains, whether that's a new programming concept, a circuit simulation, or a piece of music theory.

04 // Projects

What I've Built

PROJECT — 01 · PHYSICS MINI PROJECT
Smart Water Bottle 💧
A physics project that reimagines the humble water bottle as an intelligent IoT health device. The system identifies the type of liquid (water or juice), estimates calories and sugar concentration using predefined nutritional databases on the microcontroller, measures volume consumed via a flow sensor, and lets users control liquid temperature through a Peltier module — all synced to a mobile app via Bluetooth/Wi-Fi and displayed on an OLED screen.
Features: Real-time temperature control · Daily hydration tracking · Calorie detection · Smart reminders · Mobile app connectivity · Portable rechargeable design
Arduino/ESP32TDS Sensor DS18B20 Temp SensorPeltier Module OLED DisplayIoT/BluetoothFlow Sensor
PROJECT — 02 · CHEMISTRY / ENGINEERING PROJECT
Automatic Heat-Detecting Stove 🔥
Developed with teammates Aditya Funde and Gayatri Sejwani. Addresses a critical real-world problem: unattended stoves causing fire accidents and energy waste. A heat sensor continuously monitors the stove surface — if no heat is detected, a relay automatically cuts off the power supply, preventing disasters without any manual intervention.
Applications: Home & industrial kitchens · Restaurants · Catering services. Future scope includes AI-based heat pattern analysis and smart home integration.
Heat SensorRelay Module MicrocontrollerPower Management Circuit DesignEmbedded Systems

06 // Beyond Code

Interests & Hobbies

🎸
Playing Guitar
Cleared two levels of the prestigious Akhil Bharatiya Gandharva Mahavidyalaya guitar examination — Prarambhik (Grade Pratham, 2018) and Praveshika Pratham (Grade Pratham, 2019). Music has been a lifelong creative outlet that builds discipline, pattern recognition, and emotional expression.
🏔️
Hiking & Trekking
Loves exploring the trails and viewpoints of the Western Ghats around Maharashtra — breathtaking landscapes, rugged terrain, and crisp mountain air. Hiking builds patience, physical endurance, and a deep appreciation for the natural world.
🎨
Drawing & Visual Art
Cleared both Elementary (Grade B, 2019) and Intermediate (Grade C, 2022) Government of Maharashtra Drawing Grade Examinations. Also received additional marks for Drawing in SSC. Art cultivates visual thinking and spatial reasoning — skills that directly feed into circuit design and UI sensibility.
⚽
Playing Sports
An active sports enthusiast who values teamwork, discipline, and a competitive mindset. Sports teach you to perform under pressure, communicate with teammates, and stay focused — all of which translate directly into engineering challenges and collaborative projects.
🎵
Listening to Music
Music across genres — from Indian classical to contemporary — is a constant companion while coding, studying, or simply unwinding. Growing up learning classical guitar has given Shantanu a deep ear for structure, rhythm, and harmony in everything he does.
